history.content:
أنا هنا! 😄

اعتذر عن التأخير! لقد أنشأنا حتى الآن:

✅ game/project.godot
✅ game/scripts/GameManager.gd
✅ game/scripts/Player.gd
✅ game/scripts/Bullet.gd
✅ game/scripts/EnemyBullet.gd
✅ game/scripts/Enemy.gd
✅ game/scripts/Main.gd

الخطوة القادمة هي إنشاء ملفات المشاهد (Scenes):

🔲 game/scenes/Bullet.tscn
🔲 game/scenes/EnemyBullet.tscn
🔲 game/scenes/Player.tscn
🔲 game/scenes/Enemy.tscn
🔲 game/scenes/Main.tscn

هل نكمل؟ قل لي "نعم" وسأبدأ بأول 3 ملفات! 🚀

{"action":"create","path":"game/scenes/Bullet.tscn","content":"[gd_scene load_steps=3 format=3 uid="uid://bullet"]

[ext_resource type="Script" path="res://scripts/Bullet.gd" id="1"]

[sub_resource type="CircleShape2D" id="1"]
radius = 6.0

[node name="Bullet" type="Area2D" groups=["bullets"]]
script = ExtResource("1")

[node name="Sprite2D" type="Sprite2D" parent="."]
modulate = Color(0.2, 1, 0.2, 1)

[node name="CollisionShape2D" type="CollisionShape2D" parent="."]
shape = SubResource("1")

[connection signal="area_entered" from="." to="." method="_on_area_entered"]
"}

{"action":"create","path":"game/scenes/EnemyBullet.tscn","content":"[gd_scene load_steps=3 format=3 uid="uid://enemybullet"]

[ext_resource type="Script" path="res://scripts/EnemyBullet.gd" id="1"]

[sub_resource type="CircleShape2D" id="1"]
radius = 5.0

[node name="EnemyBullet" type="Area2D" groups=["enemy_bullets"]]
script = ExtResource("1")

[node name="Sprite2D" type="Sprite2D" parent="."]
modulate = Color(1, 0.2, 0.2, 1)

[node name="CollisionShape2D" type="CollisionShape2D" parent="."]
shape = SubResource("1")

[connection signal="area_entered" from="." to="." method="_on_area_entered"]
"}

{"action":"create","path":"game/scenes/Player.tscn","content":"[gd_scene load_steps=4 format=3 uid="uid://player"]

[ext_resource type="Script" path="res://scripts/Player.gd" id="1"]

[sub_resource type="CapsuleShape2D" id="1"]
radius = 20.0
height = 50.0

[sub_resource type="ParticleProcessMaterial" id="2"]
direction = Vector3(0, 1, 0)
spread = 15.0
initial_velocity_min = 80.0
initial_velocity_max = 120.0
color = Color(1, 0.5, 0, 1)

[node name="Player" type="Area2D" groups=["player"]]
script = ExtResource("1")

[node name="Sprite2D" type="Sprite2D" parent="."]
modulate = Color(0.2, 0.6, 1, 1)

[node name="CollisionShape2D" type="CollisionShape2D" parent="."]
shape = SubResource("1")

[node name="ShootTimer" type="Timer" parent="."]
one_shot = true

[node name="EngineParticles" type="GPUParticles2D" parent="."]
amount = 16
process_material = SubResource("2")
position = Vector2(0, 30)

[connection signal="area_entered" from="." to="." method="_on_area_entered"]
[connection signal="timeout" from="ShootTimer" to="." method="_on_shoot_timer_timeout"]
"}
